sidebar-resizer.settings.enableSidebarRe: Show a drag handle on the inner edge of the sidebar to set its width. Your width is remembered on this device.
sidebar-resizer.settings.enableChatResiz: Show a drag handle on the top edge of the chat input to set its height. Your height is remembered on this device.
sidebar-resizer.settings.enableWindowRes: Make popped-out sidebar windows (Combat Tracker, Playlists, directories, etc.) resizable. Takes effect after a reload.
